description: Machine-readable index for curated public visual assets. Use this before inspecting images visually.

groups.title: EduGap Brand Assets
groups.notes: Prefer logo-cropped.png for visible EduGap wordmark. Prefer icon-192x192.png or icon-512x512.png for square logo slots.

groups.title: Sofi Mascot State Assets
groups.notes: Use 512px files by default. Use 1024px only for large panels or high-density hero placements.

groups.title: Sofi Expression Avatars
groups.notes: Runtime UI should use WebP files. PNG files in this folder are source exports and should not be used in normal UI.

groups.title: Learning Scenery Illustrations
groups.notes: Use 320 for small cards/mobile, 640 for default desktop cards, 960 only for large panels.

groups.title: Learning Soil Progress Strips
groups.notes: Use WebP files in runtime UI. These are low-detail thin soil bars; keep them visually slim and do not place text inside the asset.

groups.title: Practice Garden Backgrounds
groups.notes: Use as low-opacity decorative backgrounds only. Do not place detailed background imagery inside individual practice cards.

groups.title: Code Bay App Backgrounds
groups.notes: Use at the outermost app/page shell level behind all content. Do not place these images inside cards, side panels, or dense text areas.

groups.title: Legacy Root Brand Aliases
groups.notes: Prefer /brand/edugap assets for new UI. Root /favicon.ico and /logo.jpeg are compatibility copies.

globalUsageRules: Use Next.js Image for local raster assets when possible.
Use decorative alt="" and aria-hidden="true" for non-content illustrations.
Reserve width, height, or aspect ratio to prevent layout shift.
Do not use source PNG files when optimized WebP runtime files exist.
Do not put detailed illustrations behind dense text.
